title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF LAZI NATIONAL AGRICULTURAL SCHOOL IN BARANGAY TIGBAWAN, MUNICIPALITY OF LAZI, PROVINCE OF SIQUIJOR INTO LAZI TECHNICAL INSTITUTE

chunks.text:
H. No. 2697; 109 OG No. 46, 7753 (November 18, 2013)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10622, September 06, 2013 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF LAZI NATIONAL AGRICULTURAL SCHOOL IN BARANGAY TIGBAWAN, MUNICIPALITY OF LAZI, PROVINCE OF SIQUIJOR INTO LAZI TECHNICAL INSTITUTE

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Renaming of a National Agricultural School

. â The name of Lazi National Agricultural School in Barangay Tigbawan, Municipality of Lazi, Province of Siquijor is hereby changed to Lazi Technical Institute.

SEC. 2.

Location of the Main Campus

. â The main campus of the Lazi Technical Institute shall continue to remain in its present location in Barangay Tigbawan, Municipality of Lazi, Province of Siquijor.

SEC. 3.

Effectivity

. â This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

JINGGOY EJERCITO ESTRADA

Acting Senate President

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on February 6, 2013 and February 4, 2013, respectively.

(Sgd.)

EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: SEPT 06 2013

(Sgd.) BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
